requirements.dataRule: Project FI target, FI age, CPF bucket, scenario deltas, and expense updates from validated planner inputs.
requirements.manualEvidence: Desktop dashboard and impact preview review against synthetic planner profile.
requirements.uiSurface: Mobile Home, Desktop Dashboard, Review Impact Preview
requirements.releaseGate: Planner tests pass and import-to-projection synthetic fixture demonstrates expense update.

requirements.dataRule: Parser requests and responses use the documented bridge schema and commit normalized rows with import audit metadata.
requirements.manualEvidence: Synthetic StatementSensei success fixture imports through preview and commit flow.
requirements.releaseGate: Parser bridge, duplicate detection, and import workflow tests pass.

requirements.dataRule: Categorization applies user rules, merchant heuristics, MCC defaults, then review fallback in priority order.
requirements.manualEvidence: Review correction dialog shows category changes and recalculation trigger.

requirements.source: User change request: refunds net off existing amount
requirements.dataRule: Matched refunds reduce net spend for the original purchase period and unmatched or rejected refunds do not reduce spend.
requirements.manualEvidence: Review Inbox shows refund exceptions and impact preview shows net-spend delta.
requirements.releaseGate: Refund matcher and net-spend tests pass.

requirements.source: User change request: no miles for refunded transactions
requirements.dataRule: Refunded and explicitly ineligible transactions create excluded or reversal ledger entries instead of new earned miles.
requirements.manualEvidence: Cards tab and review impact preview show miles impact after refund correction.
requirements.releaseGate: Reward formula, ledger, and refund tests pass.

requirements.source: User change request: Singapore card miles formulas
requirements.dataRule: Card rules store source metadata, category/channel eligibility, caps, base rates, bonus rates, rounding, and transfer blocks.
requirements.manualEvidence: Cards tab shows accumulated miles and rule caveats for seeded Singapore cards.
requirements.releaseGate: Golden formula fixtures match current card rule outputs.

requirements.source: User change request: accumulated, redeemable, and next chunk miles
requirements.dataRule: Reward projection aggregates pending, confirmed, reversed, redeemable miles, and spend required for the next transfer block.
requirements.manualEvidence: Cards tab shows next redeemable chunk and reward status totals.
requirements.releaseGate: Redeemable projection tests pass for exact block and next-block cases.

requirements.source: User change request: MCC database tagged to merchant text heuristics
requirements.dataRule: MCC taxonomy and merchant heuristics provide category, miles eligibility, confidence, explanation, and learning-loop updates.
requirements.manualEvidence: Review correction dialog captures MCC correction and future heuristic learning.
requirements.releaseGate: MCC seed, heuristic resolution, and learning-loop tests pass.

requirements.source: Approved UI direction: mobile landing page
requirements.dataRule: Mobile Home presents FIRE progress without a duplicate Fire Progress card or unnecessary percentage line chart.
requirements.manualEvidence: Mobile viewport screenshot review for Home, Cards, and Review tabs.
requirements.uiSurface: Mobile Home, Mobile Cards Tab, Mobile Review Tab
requirements.releaseGate: Component and Playwright app-shell tests pass.

requirements.source: Approved UI direction: desktop modern layout with necessary cards only
requirements.dataRule: Desktop dashboard uses the modern visual system with dashboard layout, review workflow, and non-redundant cards.
requirements.manualEvidence: Desktop viewport screenshot review for dashboard, review inbox, and correction dialog.
requirements.uiSurface: Desktop Dashboard, Desktop Review Inbox, Correction Dialog
requirements.releaseGate: Component, review model, impact preview, and Playwright tests pass.

requirements.dataRule: SQLite stores local-first profiles, imports, transactions, MCC/merchant seeds, card rules, reward ledger, and planner snapshots with constraints.
requirements.manualEvidence: Migration dry run against a temporary database.
requirements.releaseGate: Database tests pass and migration command succeeds on a temporary database.

requirements.dataRule: Do not store source statement files by default, redact sensitive logs, and keep real-data mode gated by encryption readiness.
requirements.manualEvidence: SECURITY_CONTROLS.md review and log/export scan evidence.
requirements.uiSurface: Import Workflow, Local Export, Security Controls
requirements.releaseGate: Security tests pass and real-data mode remains disabled for web or unknown platforms.

requirements.dataRule: Wander Guide captures bundled onboarding answers as structured planner setup inputs before any planner data is persisted.
requirements.manualEvidence: Desktop setup screenshot showing Wander Guide orb, timeline bundle, and progress state.
requirements.releaseGate: Onboarding unit, component, and Playwright tests pass.

requirements.dataRule: Singapore FIRE projections model configurable CPF contribution bands, CPF account allocation, CPF LIFE payout, healthcare reserve, retirement spending, property equity treatment, and FIRE milestones.
requirements.manualEvidence: Planner calculation review using a synthetic Singapore profile with CPF, property, healthcare, and retirement drawdown assumptions.
requirements.releaseGate: Singapore FIRE engine unit tests pass and assumptions remain configurable.

requirements.dataRule: Goal gap planner calculates inflation-adjusted targets, remaining gaps, monthly funding requirements, FIRE conflicts, pressure labels, and next best actions for active financial goals.
requirements.manualEvidence: Planner review showing active goals ranked by priority, gap, deadline pressure, and FIRE impact.
requirements.releaseGate: Goal gap planner unit tests pass and every active goal receives a pressure label and explanation.

requirements.dataRule: Advisor insight engine converts FIRE projection, goal gaps, reserve coverage, savings gap, and expense drift into prioritized insights with severity, recommended action, confidence, and decision trace.
requirements.manualEvidence: Advisor review showing no recommendation is presented without confidence, caveat, and why-this trace.
requirements.releaseGate: Advisor insight tests pass and every generated insight includes a decision trace.

requirements.dataRule: SQLite stores advisor-grade planner inputs, goals, projection runs, projection rows, and advisor insights with export/import coverage.
requirements.manualEvidence: Migration dry run against a temporary database and export/import artifact review.
requirements.releaseGate: Database migration, repository, and export/import tests pass.
